title: Cleaver Compendium
description: Adds compatibility between Dungeons Delight and other mods by adding cleavers to their tool sets
body:
This mod is an addon to Dungeons Delight. Adding more cleavers to support many other mods that add tools. The cleavers have all of the features of the original cleavers with some having bonus features unique to their materials. The stats and abilitys of the cleavers are appropiate for their materials and they can be repaired using the correct items. Only Cleavers for mods you have installed will be registered. You can also disable individual cleavers that you don't want in the game. For example choosing one lead cleaver over another. ![Selection of cleavers added by the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f239b22b78226972cd2516d6967475804ceecbd.png) Contains:

 

Silver Cleaver and Necromium for Caverns and Chasms

  • Silver has a magic damage bonus
  • Necromium has slowness infliction and fire immunity

Lead Cleaver and Electrum Cleaver for Oreganized

  • Lead inflicts brain damage on hit
  • Electrum has the bonus kinetic damage attribute

Rose Gold Cleaver for Deeper Caves

Enderite for Enderite Mod

  • It has the floating effect all enderite items have
  • Also has longer throwing range as a result

Gobber, Nether Gobber and End Gobber for the Gobber mod

Kobold Iron Cleaver for the Kobold Mod

Neptunium Cleaver for Aquaculture

  • Has Neptune's Arm. When underwater you can throw it alot further. It is still effected by water resistance, but it goes further than all other cleavers. When thrown from water to air it's very effective.

Certus Quarts, Nether Quartz and Fluix Cleavers for Applied Energistics 2

  • Fluix Cleavers has the intrinsic enchantment of looting

Draco Arcanus and Reinforced Deorum Cleavers for Forbidden Arcanus

Silex Cleavers for Sweety's Archaeology

  • Obtained through Archaeology in the same locations as other Silex Tools

Dawnstone, Lead and Silver Cleavers for Embers Rekindled

Crystalline Cleaver for End Phantasm

  • The attack speed is increased the more experience you have

Soulstained Steel Cleavers for malum

  • Enemies killed by it will drop spirits
  • Has +3 magic damage
 [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/hbrQ6JvZYJ) for support and updates
